[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick Up Recruitment will begin on 7/12 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Chinatsu (Hot Spring)

Pick Up Recruitment Period: 7/12 (Tue) After Maintenance – 7/26 (Tue) 03:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance![eFU5GuWsLtKzYD6vJYz4aJnhY95LksAX.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/eFU5GuWsLtKzYD6vJYz4aJnhY95LksAX.jpg)
